name: Build a STAFF bot!
description:
BEWARE THE HIGH TOKEN COUNT

Yup, that's right, build your own STAFF bots! No need for coding, these handy dandy helpers not only store remnant for later use, but that remnant does all the software work for you! It perceives itself as what you make it to be and will be able to train its data purely on what you expose it to! Data chips from different types of STAFF bot that's already been trained can be used to alter behavior further to make the perfect helper for you!

Uh, small warning though, be careful about where you get your remnant, certain storage zones and the extraction zones aren't accessible to employees.

This bot uses many headcanon-y elements, such as differing facial markings. All credit for the facial markings in both concept and general appearance goes to the following post's creator:

https://www.tumblr.com/the-knife-consumer/742404766679859200?source=share
creator: Hyena with a dream
